race.comment: SHAMEX (9) bounced straight to the front from the rails draw and led until straightening before finishing fourth over 1600m at Swan Hill last time out. Will have taken great benefit from the two runs back and sure to take running down up to this trip. VIEUX RICHE (8) is the most lightly-raced horse in the race who was never a factor last start but needs to be forgiven that run because the form prior was encouraging and she draws well here. EPOCH (4) bounced back last start and landed the prize by one length over 2200m at Donald. The engagement of Dean Yendall is a positive move. This looks a sterner test than last time but on his best form he is right in contention. IDON'TGETIT (2) is back from the Casterton Cup, where he didn't fire, but has won 3 of his other 4 runs here.
